description: An obvious hummingbird but much larger then other hummingbirds accompanying it (Rufous and Broad-taile). Dark green above with no apparent pale edging to the feathers. Underparts grayish with a scaly appearance. Flanks slightly washed with green. Tail darker than back with black band and lighter tail corner (not white). Bill long, black and fairly straight. Face grayish with white postocular spot shped like a triangle and an indistinct postocular line. There were several hummingbirds in the area that had responded to a Screech-Owl mob tape. This bird was noticed because the wing beats were much slower and it was much larger than all of the otheres that responded. It perched briefly on a branch in full sun and then vanished.
